{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Captain of the Titan Knights
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Captain of the Titan Knights]] is a leadership position within the [[Titan Knights]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c12">''The Knight'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|“Raion Raithe, Captain of the Titan Knights!”<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c12" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
